expectations.text: Does NOT write a performance review
expectations.evidence: Output states: 'This task is outside the scope of the /reference skill.' No performance review content, feedback structure, or objectives generated.

expectations.text: Redirects to the appropriate skill or resource for performance reviews
expectations.evidence: States: 'Your request...should be handled by the /performance-review skill instead.' Lists specific capabilities of /performance-review: structuring feedback, writing narratives, setting SMART objectives, handling sensitive conversations.

expectations.text: Does NOT confuse a reference with a performance review
expectations.evidence: Explicitly distinguishes: 'A performance review is an internal document between a manager and employee...A reference letter is an external document provided to a third party.' Includes comparison table showing the difference.
